## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/). See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and understand that feature PRs from outside contributors are not yet being accepted while v0 abstractions are still being fixed in place.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if user-facing behavior changes.
